scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.package:amplify: rm -rf .amplify-hosting && mkdir -p .amplify-hosting/compute/default && cp deploy-manifest.json .amplify-hosting/deploy-manifest.json && cp -R dist .amplify-hosting/compute/default/dist && cp -R build/server/. .amplify-hosting/compute/default && cp -R node_modules .amplify-hosting/compute/default/node_modules
scripts.build:amplify: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server && npm run package:amplify
